'''Pirate's Treasure''' is a quest in which you help the pirate [[Redbeard Frank]] obtain some [[Karamjan rum]] in return for the location of the treasure of [[One-Eyed Hector]], his old captain.

==Details==
{{Quest details
|start = Speak to [[Redbeard Frank]] at the northernmost dock at [[Port Sarim]], just outside [[The Rusty Anchor]].
|startmap = 3052,3252
|difficulty = Novice
|description = Redbeard Frank knows the location of pirate treasure, but he'll only part with the knowledge for a bottle of [[Karamjan rum]].
|length = Very Short
|requirements = Able to defeat or run away from a [[Combat level]] 4 [[gardener]].
|items = *[[Karamjan rum]] (obtainable during the quest for 30 coins)
*[[White apron]] (obtainable during the quest in Port Sarim at [[Gerrant's Fishy Business.]])
*60 [[coins]] (only 30 are needed if using a [[Ring of charos|Ring of charos(a)]])
*10 [[banana]]s (obtainable during the quest)
*[[Spade]] (obtainable during the quest)
|recommended = *Fast travel to several locations
**[[Port Sarim]] to start the quest - [[Amulet of glory]] to [[Draynor Village]] or [[Explorer's ring]] 2-4 or [[Teleport to House]] (Rimmington) or [[Skills necklace]] to [[Crafting Guild]]
**[[Varrock]] (1 trip) - [[Varrock Teleport]] or [[Chronicle]] or [[Ring of wealth]] or [[Skills necklace]]
**[[Falador Park]] (1 trip) - [[Ring of wealth]] or [[Falador Teleport]]
|kills = [[Gardener]] ''(level 4, optional)''
|leagueRegion = <poem>
Unlocking {{LeagueRegion|Morytania}} {{okay}} will auto-complete the quest
</poem>
}}

==Walkthrough==
===Captain Redbeard===
{{Needed|60 [[coins]].}}
[[File:Redbeard Frank chathead.png|left|frameless|100px]]
Talk to [[Redbeard Frank]] located in front of the northernmost dock in [[Port Sarim]]. Tell him you are in search of treasure, and he will ask you to bring him some [[Karamjan rum]] before he'll tell you where to find some.

Walk south on the docks to see three sailors (NOT the [[Monk of Entrana|Monks of Entrana]]). Talk to any one of these sailors to board the ship to [[Karamja]] for 30 [[coins]] (free using a [[Ring of Charos (a)]]).
{{Clear}}
===Rum smuggling===
{{Needed|30 [[coins]].}}
{{Map|name=Pirate's Treasure crate|x=2939|y=3149|r=1|mtype=pin|align=right|caption=Location of the crate used to hide the rum.|width=200|height=200}}
[[File:Zembo chathead.png|left|frameless]]
When you arrive in Karamja, follow the path to the west and enter the [[Karamja Wines, Spirits, and Beers|bar]]. Trade with [[Zembo]] and buy one [[Karamjan rum]].

'''Do not leave the island''' with the rum - it will be confiscated by the [[Customs officer|officers]] as [[Asgarnia]] has banned the import of intoxicating spirits. The bottle will also break if you teleport or accept a [[random event]] where you would be temporarily teleported.

You will need to find a method to smuggle the rum off the island. First, pick 10 [[banana]]s from the plantation to the north. Then talk to [[Luthas]] in his hut to the east of the plantation and ask him for a job, and he will hire you as his worker.

Outside the south east corner of his hut is a [[Crate (Pirate's Treasure)|crate]]. Use the rum on it to hide it in the crate, then "Fill Crate" on it to fill it with bananas.

'''Note''': If you get a message saying "Why would I want to do that?" make sure you have asked for employment first.

Talk to Luthas again and he will pay you 30 coins for loading the crate. Ask him where the crate goes, and he will tell you they go to [[Wydin]], who owns the food store in [[Port Sarim]]. Travel back to Port Sarim at the customs officer to the east for 30 coins (free with [[Ring of charos (a)]]).

===Retrieving the rum===
{{Map|name=Chest|x=3219|y=3396|plane=1|mtype=pin|align=right|caption=Location of Hector's chest.|width=200|height=200}}
{{Needed|recommended=a teleport to [[Varrock Teleport|Varrock]] and [[Falador Teleport|Falador]].}}
[[File:Wydin chathead.png|left]]
Once you are in Port Sarim, make a quick stop at [[Gerrant's Fishy Business|the fishing shop]] just to the west. Hanging on the back wall is a [[white apron]]. Take it and wear it.

Talk to [[Wydin]] at his [[Wydin's Food Store|food store]] directly south of the fishing shop, and ask him for a job. He will agree as long as you are wearing your [[white apron]]. Enter the back room and search the [[Crate (Food Store, banana)|crate]] with a [[banana]] on top of it. You will find the rum. '''Do not teleport with it in your inventory (including random events).''' Head back to [[Redbeard Frank]] and give him the drink.

Frank will give you a [[Chest key (Pirate's Treasure)|key]] to the chest found upstairs in [[Varrock|Varrock's]] [[Blue Moon Inn]], owned by the now deceased [[One-Eyed Hector]]. Travel to [[Varrock]] and head to the [[Blue Moon Inn]] located just north of the city's southern gate. Go upstairs and find the chest in the room at the end of the hall. Use the key on the chest to find a [[pirate message]]. It will give you a clue to the treasure's location. '''Be sure to read the clue'''.

===Buried treasure===
{{Needed|[[Spade]], [[pirate message]]|recommended=A [[weapon]].}}
[[File:Gardener chathead.png|left]]
[[File:Pirate's Treasure - Buried treasure location.png|thumb|200px|Location of the buried treasure.]]
Travel to Falador Park, located in the north of Falador. If you don't yet have a spade, grab one from the estate agency just south-west of the park. Find the statue of [[Saradomin]] in the middle of the park, and notice where it's pointing. Note the configuration of the dirt, which vaguely makes an X. Stand in the middle of the dirt "X" and dig.
An angry level-4 [[gardener]] will appear out of nowhere and attack you. You will be unable to dig again until you either kill him, or run out of the park to despawn him. Dig again in the same spot to get a casket and complete the quest.
{{Map|name=Chest|x=2999|y=3383|plane=0|mtype=pin|align=right|caption=Location of the buried treasure.|width=200|height=200}}

'''Congratulations, Quest Complete!'''

==Required for completing==
Completion of Pirate's Treasure is required for the following:
*[[Cabin Fever]]

== Transcript==
{{Hastranscript|quest}}

==Trivia==
*When using the Casket received as a reward for completing the quest on Redbeard Frank, the player's character offers to share the treasure with him, but he refuses and insists that the player should keep all of it for their own as they have earned it.
*When the quest was first released, the [[Karamja rum]] was tradeable and the bottles would not break if players tried to teleport. Some players simply bought a whole load of rum and sold it to players doing the quest, allowing them to skip a large part of it. When this was posted on fan forums, a Jagex developer saw it and the problem was soon corrected.
*If you have completed [[Rum Deal]] prior to starting this quest, you will ask Redbeard Frank if [[Braindeath 'Rum']] will do instead instead of Karamjan rum, in which case Redbeard refuses immediately, calling it 'swill'.
*If you give Redbeard Frank some [[Karamjan rum (sliced banana)|Karamja rum with sliced banana]] in it, he will take it at first, but will give it back when talked to again, stating that he doesn't like bananas in his rum.
*If you give Redbeard Frank some [[Karamjan rum (banana)|Karamja rum with a banana]] stuffed in it, he will take it at first, but will give it back, saying "Arr - this here rum's got a banana stuck in it!".
*As the completed quest journal text indicates, it was at one time necessary to complete the quest in order to travel between Port Sarim and Musa Point, as well as to continue to work for Luthas.

{{Pirate's Treasure}}
